applicationAdvancedBuildServer.title: Build Server
applicationAdvancedBuildServer.description: Configure a dedicated server for building your application.

alerts.infoOffload: Build servers offload the build process from your deployment servers. Select a build server and registry to use for building your application.
alerts.infoImportantRich: 📊 <imp>Important:</imp> Once the build finishes, you'll need to wait a few seconds for the deployment server to download the image. These download logs will <not>NOT</not> appear in the build deployment logs. Check the <logs>Logs</logs> tab to see when the container starts running.
alerts.infoNoteRich: <note>Note:</note> Build Server and Build Registry must be configured together. You can either select both or set both to None.
alerts.registryRequiredRich: You need to add at least one registry to use build servers. Please go to <link>Settings</link> to add a registry.

form.descServer: Select a build server to handle the build process for this application.
form.descRegistry: Select a registry to store the built images from the build server.

validation.bothOrNone: Both Build Server and Build Registry must be selected together, or both set to None
